channel.title: The Car Jury, News
channel.description: News and verdicts on the Indian car market from The Car Jury.

item.title: Tata Tiago Facelift Lands 28 May: Mild Refresh, Not a Reinvention
item.description: Tata confirms the 2026 Tiago facelift for 28 May with revised styling and more equipment. Here is what buyers should actually expect.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti's Triple Test: YMC EV, Brezza and Baleno Facelifts Spied Together
item.description: Maruti's YMC electric MPV was spotted testing alongside the Brezza and Baleno facelifts, signalling a packed 2026-27 product run for the brand.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti's Second Kharkhoda Plant Goes Live: Brezza, Victoris Output Hits Top Gear
item.description: Maruti Suzuki begins production at its second Kharkhoda plant, taking total India capacity to 26.5 lakh units annually across four facilities.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Ethanol Surplus Is Real, Flex-Fuel Cars Are Not: CareEdge Calls It
item.description: CareEdge says India's ethanol capacity is running at 60% utilisation and flex-fuel vehicle adoption will stay slow for at least three years.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Sierra EV Confirmed For July-September 2026: The BE6 Finally Has A Rival
item.description: Tata confirms Sierra EV for Q2 FY2026-27, targeting under Rs 18 lakh and 450 km range to take on the Mahindra BE6. Here are the facts.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)
